beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Nottingham Forest have faced Portuguese opposition at home just once in European competition, though that came against Porto when they beat them 2-0 at the City Ground back in October in the league phase of this season’s UEFA Europa League. In their major European history, FC Porto have played 24 away matches in England and have never won. Their only ‘away’ win against an English side was against Chelsea in April 2021 in a UEFA Champions League quarter-final second leg, which was played in Seville due to covid-19 restrictions.
